title: Yomiko German Shepherd (Small)
features: Suki's classics are the most realistic animal creation at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all!
Black and tan soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Suki Classics lifelike animal collection
description: Product Description Supersoft plush small German Shepherd from Suki Gifts International dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears and Plush toys. Box Contains 1 x Small German Shepherd
